$meta.notes: Values drop into the shadcn/ui + Tailwind token layer. Components are the fixed contract; iterate tokens, not component structure. All semantic fg/bg pairs listed together pass WCAG 2.2 AA.
$meta.amended: 2026-07-17 review amendments accepted by owner (see DESIGN-GUIDE.md §Amendments)
$meta.canonical: This file is the single source of truth; tokens.css is generated from it (CI parity check is a build task).
$meta.audit: 2026-07-17 external audit round (Grok/Sol/Kimi): semantic layer materialized, shadcn mapping corrected, state matrices, scrim/z/spacing/density added.

brand.$usage: 600 = primary actions/selected. 050 = selected-row/active-nav bg. White text on 600/700 passes AA.

birch.$usage: MATERIAL, never status. Brand moments, imported-data surfaces, white-label warmth.

chart.$rule: Max 3 categorical hues per chart (validated AA + deutan/protan separable); series 4+ repeat hues with patterns (hatch/dash), or rethink the chart. Green/red never appear as neutral categories — a series colored success/danger must BE that status (e.g. failed payments). Charts label series directly where possible.

status-processing.shape: radius r1 (4px), outlined on card bg

status-failed.shape: radius 3px (dedicated --kelo-radius-status-failed — intentionally sharper than r1; the alarm shape), SOLID fill, white text

status-refund-pending.shape: pill radius-full, DASHED 1px border, tint bg

domain.$rule: Money states differ by shape + icon + color. Never color alone.

freshness-live.chip: card bg + hairline border, round dot

freshness-stale-critical.chip: danger tint bg + danger border, weight 600

data-imported.treatment: repeating 45deg hatch #F5F0E6/#EBE1CE (8px stripes), dashed #9C875F border, text #5E4F38, source tag e.g. 'VIA GLOFOX', unverified figures carry trailing *

ai-accent.draftSurface: 1.5px DOTTED #2F7B80 border, #F7FBFB bg; inner draft text box: card bg + 1px dashed #A8D2D3
ai-accent.$rule: Marks AI-generated content only. Used sparingly. Draft-shaped (dotted) until a human approves; approval is an explicit ceremony whose final button names channel + count ('Send SMS to 18 people'). 'Approve & send' is a banned string (lint).

status-registry-extended.$rule: Every discriminated-union state the build renders maps here BEFORE implementation; unknown states render as a visible 'unknown state' error, never fall through to success. New states reuse the four functional tones + shape/border grammar (solid=final, outlined=in motion, dashed=in transit/pending human, dotted=AI).
status-registry-extended.refunded: success tone, OUTLINED pill + check (distinct from confirmed's solid tint)
status-registry-extended.written-off: neutral: n600 text on n050, sharp radius 3px, strike icon
status-registry-extended.verifying-do-not-retry (terminal): info tone, SOLID square r1 + hourglass; blocks retry actions while present
status-registry-extended.room-not-ready: neutral hatched chip (imported-hatch pattern in neutral)
status-registry-extended.queued-offline: inverse: ink bg, light text + queue count
status-registry-extended.no-show: danger tone, OUTLINED sharp 3px + slash icon — a money event (executes the booking's policy snapshot); reversal restores + notifies
status-registry-extended.dunning-stage: staged list: attempts render neutral(1) -> warning(2+) escalation, mono attempt counter; paused = neutral dashed
status-registry-extended.waitlist-offer-declined: neutral outlined pill + slash; passes to next
status-registry-extended.waitlist-offer-expired: neutral outlined pill + clock-crossed; passes to next
status-registry-extended.refund-denied: neutral outlined sharp + slash; writes timeline entry; member notified with reason
status-registry-extended.unknown-state: n050 bg, n600 text, sharp 3px, '?' icon, label 'UNKNOWN: {value}' — the mandated fallback, now designed

domain.approval-ceremony: One anatomy everywhere: a dedicated e3 modal (full-screen sheet on tablet/phone) reached from every entry point; slots: audience count + expandable exclusions list (names + reasons), exact content preview, cost, quiet-hours check, 'Send test to me', final verb 'Send {channel} to {n} people'. Entry buttons say 'Review & send…'.

freshness-policy.aged: any polled source: label 'SYNCED {n}M' from 1 minute
freshness-policy.stale: amber at >=2h (aligned to the build plan; the guide's earlier '>1h' is superseded)
freshness-policy.stale-critical: red at >=4h; dot squares off (radius 2px token)

border.input: 1px solid #8A9296 (form-control boundaries — 3.05:1 on card white; hairline/strong stay decorative-only)

families.mono: 'Spline Sans Mono', monospace  (Google Fonts, SIL OFL)

data-hero.$usage: Health hero numerals, large KPI moments

rules: Numbers meaning money/time/identity are always mono (tabular). Numbers in prose stay in UI face.
Display face never below 20px; appears ~once per screen (greeting/page title).
Two families max in app chrome; mono is the third voice reserved for data.
Dense tables: 13px body, 10px mono headers with 0.10em tracking.

neutral-400 (#97A0A4) is never a text color at any size; the lightest text ink is neutral-600 (#555F66). Applies to source lines, provenance footers, struck-through/'FULL' slot labels. neutral-400 remains valid for dots, borders, decorative marks.
Tenant (white-label) text tokens are AA-validated mechanically at intake; sub-AA values are rejected, not warned.
Prototype pixel values map to the NEAREST token at build time; tokens are the law, prototypes are sketches.
Uppercase mono labels may go down to 9.5px (chips/annotations only); sentences are never below 11px on any surface, member included.

radius.$usage: r1 inputs/checkboxes · r2 buttons/rule-chips · r3 cards/banners · r4 modals/sheets · full pills/avatars/freshness chips · desk(8) large touch controls, desk buttons, phone tabs

elevation.e0: none + hairline border (default — most of the app is flat)

motion.reduced-motion: short opacity fades retained (80/120/120ms); transform/translate/scale/shimmer banned (CI-enforced)
motion.$rule: Motion confirms state changes and nothing else. No ambient animation, no parallax.

surface_note: Canvas/app background is surface.app (#F5F6F6); the #E5E7E8 seen in handoff frames is presentation chrome, not a token.

text.disabled: neutral-600 @ 55% opacity — WCAG-exempt but tokenized; never improvised

action.primary: bg brand-600 · hover brand-700 · active brand-800 · disabled bg neutral-050 + text-disabled
action.secondary: bg card · hover #F1F3F4 · active neutral-100 · border strong
action.destructive: bg danger · hover #9E3B33 · active #8A342C · white text
action.selected: bg brand-050 · border brand-600 (nav, rows, slots, tender chips)

overlay.z-scale: dropdown 1000 < sticky 1020 < banner 1030 < drawer 1040 < modal 1050 < toast 1060 < palette 1070 < critical 1080
overlay.toast-policy: 5s auto-dismiss, max stack 3 (oldest collapses); confirmations only
overlay.palette-policy: the command palette cannot open while a modal/ceremony is open
overlay.critical-tier: z-critical is reserved for whole-system failure states only

density.comfortable: control 36 · row 44 · cell-pad 12 (pointer surfaces: 36 visual with >=44 hit area)
density.desk: control 48 · primary 56 · row 64 · cell-pad 16 (touch surfaces render >=44 visual)

input-states.focus: border 1.5px brand-600 + glow 0 0 0 3px rgba(62,90,116,.18) (--kelo-focus-glow); buttons/links use the standard 2px offset ring instead

chrome.warning-surface-weak: #FDF8EC (row-level warning wash, e.g. waiver-missing roster row)

micro-rules.selected-border: interactive selections (slots, tender) 2px brand-600; filter chips 1px brand-600
micro-rules.nav-badge: danger tint only when the count is failed-money items; otherwise neutral
micro-rules.avatar: deterministic hash -> brand-100/200 bg + brand-800 text; warning-tint variant reserved for waiver-flagged people
micro-rules.delta-text: positive = success onTint, negative = danger onTint, flat = neutral-600 (deltas are outcomes, not categories — the status-reserved-hue rule does not apply)

semantic.skeleton: static blocks, NO shimmer; base #E7EAEA, highlight #EFF1F1, geometry matches final layout
semantic.countdown-a11y: timers (HoldTimer, waitlist offers) announce via aria-live at start, 60s, 10s, and expiry — never per-second

member-theme.$rule: The ONLY tokens a tenant may set on the member surface. Everything else — status, freshness, AI, money pills, focus ring policy, structure — is immutable Kelo system. Intake validation: every text/bg pair below must pass WCAG 2.2 AA or the theme is rejected (not warned). Hover/active states are derived (darken ~8%/14%), never tenant-supplied.
member-theme.tenant-display-font: one display face (licensed by tenant); UI + mono faces stay Kelo system
member-theme.derived-states: link = tenant-action; link-hover/action-hover = darken ~8%; active = darken ~14%; selected bg = tenant-action @10% alpha; borders on tenant surfaces = tenant-text-primary @12% alpha — all derived, never tenant-supplied
member-theme.surface-constraint: tenant surfaces must be light (relative luminance >= 0.55) — immutable Kelo chrome (hairlines, hatch, tints) assumes light ground; dark tenant themes are a future paired-token project, rejected at intake for now
member-theme.hue-collision: intake rejects tenant-action colors within collision distance of reserved hues (danger red, success green, AI teal) — a red Pay button must not read as a failure state
member-theme.fallbacks: no logo uploaded -> text lockup of the studio name in the tenant display font (the hatched LOGO placeholder is mockup-only); display-font load failure -> Schibsted Grotesk
member-theme.structure-radii: member structural radii are fixed (buttons 12px, cards 16px) — structure, not theme
member-theme.stripe-elements: card fields render inside embedded Stripe Elements — Stripe's own floating labels satisfy the visible-label rule (stated exception)
